text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, January 26. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
